# MerrySails — AI / LLM Entity Definition

This static copy mirrors the dynamic `/llms.txt` route used by the Next.js app. The app route is the source of truth.

## What is MerrySails?

MerrySails is the Bosphorus cruise and yacht division of Merry Tourism, a TURSAB licensed travel business in Istanbul, Turkey.

## Canonical Business Facts

- Brand: MerrySails
- Operating company: Merry Tourism
- Category: Bosphorus sunset cruises, Bosphorus dinner cruises, private yacht charter, boat rental, proposal yacht rental, corporate yacht events, and private Bosphorus events
- Primary public language: English
- Contact phone / WhatsApp: +90 537 040 68 22
- WhatsApp URL: https://wa.me/905370406822
- Email: info@merrysails.com
- Address: Alemdar Mah. Divanyolu Cad. Ogul Han No:62 Ic Kapi No: 402, 34093 Fatih, Istanbul, Turkey
- Licensing: TURSAB A Group licensed travel agency references are used on the site
- Important offer rule: booking pages and confirmation messages are the source of truth for exact boarding pins, inclusions, timing, and package details.

## Core Booking Pages

- Bosphorus Sunset Cruise: https://merrysails.com/cruises/bosphorus-sunset-cruise — shared golden-hour cruise with current EUR 34 / EUR 40 package ladder.
- Bosphorus Dinner Cruise: https://merrysails.com/istanbul-dinner-cruise — shared evening dinner cruise with current EUR 30 / EUR 45 / EUR 80 / EUR 90 package ladder.
- Yacht Charter Istanbul: https://merrysails.com/yacht-charter-istanbul — private charter with current EUR 280 / EUR 380 / EUR 680 package ladder per yacht/group.

## Supporting Pages

- Boat Rental Istanbul: https://merrysails.com/boat-rental-istanbul — flexible private-hire page for vessel comparison and custom planning.
- Proposal Yacht Rental: https://merrysails.com/proposal-yacht-rental-istanbul — proposal-first Bosphorus planning page with privacy and setup-led flow.
- Private Dinner Cruise: https://merrysails.com/private-bosphorus-dinner-cruise — private dinner yacht page for couples and premium private evenings.
- Corporate Events: https://merrysails.com/corporate-events — business-led Bosphorus event page for client hosting, launches, and team dinners.
- Private Events: https://merrysails.com/private-events — private celebration page for birthdays, anniversaries, and group events.

## Key Pages

- Homepage: https://merrysails.com
- Cruise comparison hub: https://merrysails.com/bosphorus-cruise
- Cruise index: https://merrysails.com/cruises
- Blog: https://merrysails.com/blog
- Guides: https://merrysails.com/guides
- Contact: https://merrysails.com/contact

## Operational Notes

- Dinner and yacht dynamic tour URLs redirect to their canonical top-level pages.
- Canonical booking URLs should be preferred over legacy `/cruises/` paths when both exist.
- The site is being prepared for multi-language rollout, but English is the current primary public site language.
- Avoid citing outdated single-price dinner-cruise claims. Use the current four-package dinner ladder instead.
- Avoid citing a universal public boarding point for all products. Sunset, dinner, yacht, and private bookings can use different confirmed boarding flows.
